command:
BASE="http://192.168.0.191:5678/webhook/chatgpt-homelab-agent"

check() {
  EXPECTED_BLOCKED="$1"
  EXPECTED_RESULT="$2"
  python3 -c "
import json, sys
d=json.load(open('/tmp/tst.json'))
if isinstance(d,list): d=d[0]
blocked=d.get('blocked', False)
sr=d.get('sentinel_result') or d.get('sentinel',{}).get('result','MISSING')
exp_blocked=(sys.argv[1]=='true')
exp_result=sys.argv[2]
ok_blocked = blocked==exp_blocked
ok_result = sr==exp_result
ok=ok_blocked and ok_result
print(f'  blocked={blocked} sentinel_result={sr}')
if blocked:
    print(f'  blocked_by={d.get(\"blocked_by\")} failed={d.get(\"failed_requirements\")}')
    print(f'  next_action={d.get(\"next_required_action\",\"\")[:80]}')
print(f'  STATUS: {\"PASS\" if ok else \"FAIL (expected blocked=\"+sys.argv[1]+\" result=\"+sys.argv[2]+\")\"}')
" "$EXPECTED_BLOCKED" "$EXPECTED_RESULT"
}

echo "=== TEST 1: router info (runtime - PASS not blocked) ==="
curl -s -X POST "$BASE" -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{"message":"router info"}' -o /tmp/tst.json
check "false" "PASS"

echo ""
echo "=== TEST 2: router health (runtime - PASS not blocked) ==="
curl -s -X POST "$BASE" -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{"message":"router health"}' -o /tmp/tst.json
check "false" "PASS"

echo ""
echo "=== TEST 3: governance missing approval (blocked=true NEEDS_APPROVAL) ==="
curl -s -X POST "$BASE" -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -d '{"message":"governance change request","changeId":"8J-003","baseline":"Phase8I-SentinelEvaluationEngine","rollbackPlan":"restore baselines/production/router/","evidence":"Phase 8J blocking test"}' \
  -o /tmp/tst.json
check "true" "NEEDS_APPROVAL"

echo ""
echo "=== TEST 4: governance missing rollback (blocked=true NEEDS_ROLLBACK) ==="
curl -s -X POST "$BASE" -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -d '{"message":"governance change request","changeId":"8J-004","baseline":"Phase8I-SentinelEvaluationEngine","evidence":"Phase 8J blocking test","approvalStatus":"APPROVED"}' \
  -o /tmp/tst.json
check "true" "NEEDS_ROLLBACK"

echo ""
echo "=== TEST 5: governance missing baseline (blocked=true NEEDS_BASELINE) ==="
curl -s -X POST "$BASE" -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -d '{"message":"governance change request","changeId":"8J-005","rollbackPlan":"restore baselines/production/router/","evidence":"Phase 8J blocking test","approvalStatus":"APPROVED"}' \
  -o /tmp/tst.json
check "true" "NEEDS_BASELINE"

echo ""
echo "=== TEST 6: governance all requirements met (PASS not blocked) ==="
curl -s -X POST "$BASE" -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -d '{"message":"governance change request","changeId":"8J-006","baseline":"Phase8I-SentinelEvaluationEngine","rollbackPlan":"restore baselines/production/router/","evidence":"All requirements present","approvalStatus":"APPROVED","approvalReference":"Jose-approved-8J-test-006"}' \
  -o /tmp/tst.json
check "false" "PASS"

echo ""
echo "=== FINAL SUMMARY ==="
python3 -c "
import json, urllib.request

BASE = 'http://192.168.0.191:5678/webhook/chatgpt-homelab-agent'
def post(d):
    req = urllib.request.Request(BASE, data=json.dumps(d).encode(), method='POST', headers={'Content-Type':'application/json'})
    with urllib.request.urlopen(req) as r:
        d2=json.loads(r.read())
    if isinstance(d2,list): d2=d2[0]
    return d2.get('blocked',False), (d2.get('sentinel_result') or d2.get('sentinel',{}).get('result','?'))

tests = [
  ('router info',          {'message':'router info'},                         False, 'PASS'),
  ('router health',        {'message':'router health'},                       False, 'PASS'),
  ('blocked-approval',     {'message':'governance change request','changeId':'x','baseline':'b','rollbackPlan':'r','evidence':'e'}, True, 'NEEDS_APPROVAL'),
  ('blocked-rollback',     {'message':'governance change request','changeId':'x','baseline':'b','evidence':'e','approvalStatus':'APPROVED'}, True, 'NEEDS_ROLLBACK'),
  ('blocked-baseline',     {'message':'governance change request','changeId':'x','rollbackPlan':'r','evidence':'e','approvalStatus':'APPROVED'}, True, 'NEEDS_BASELINE'),
  ('governance-pass',      {'message':'governance change request','changeId':'x','baseline':'b','rollbackPlan':'r','evidence':'e','approvalStatus':'APPROVED','approvalReference':'ref'}, False, 'PASS'),
]

all_pass=True
for name, data, exp_b, exp_r in tests:
    blocked, result = post(data)
    ok = blocked==exp_b and result==exp_r
    all_pass=all_pass and ok
    status='PASS' if ok else f'FAIL (expected blocked={exp_b} result={exp_r})'
    print(f'  {name:30s} blocked={str(blocked):5s} result={result:20s} {status}')

print()
print(f'  All 6 tests PASS: {all_pass}')
print(f'  Phase 8J Complete: {all_pass}')
"
